name: Julia Child's Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp French wine vinegar or any good quality vinegar
3 tbsp Light virgin olive oil or any good quality oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together shallots and dijon mustard.
2. Add vinegar, whisking continuously.
3. Slowly add the oil while continuing to whisk to prevent separation.
